prompt: Tint panels 1–2 warm orange, panels 3–4 cool blue.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the four-panel comic page. Apply a warm orange tint to the top-left panel (panel 1) and the top-right panel (panel 2). Apply a cool blue tint to the bottom-left panel (panel 3) and the bottom-right panel (panel 4). Use image 2 as a precise guide for the exact boundaries of each panel.
objects: top-left comic panel with a warm orange tint
top-right comic panel with a warm orange tint
bottom-left comic panel with a cool blue tint
bottom-right comic panel with a cool blue tint
